## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's proposed Statement of Work (SOW) for content marketing services with Aembit team.](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive content strategy, creation, and optimization process, starting with deep research and ramping up to 5-10 high-quality pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Aembit sees potential for GrowthX to enhance their content efforts, particularly around technical topics and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [GrowthX can integrate with Aembit's existing content initiatives, including refreshing old content and supporting new campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Engagement would likely start after RSA conference, with potential to leverage conference insights for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2117.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Content Process Overview

  - [Initial 12-week process: deep dive research, kickoff, strategy draft, site audit, calibration, and ramp-up](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Utilize multiple research sources (e.g., SEM Rush, AI APIs) for comprehensive topic exploration](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Hybrid approach combining AI assistance with human expertise for high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Focus on becoming "best answers" to key audience questions, aiming for search visibility and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Current Aembit stats: 41 ranking blogs, 220 keywords, \~63 clicks/month (U.S. desktop)](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Potential to increase from 63 to 3,000-5,000 clicks/month by optimizing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Case study: Customer went from minimal clicks to 49,000 clicks in 12 months (318 pages published)](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)

### Integration with Aembit's Existing Content

  - [Ability to refresh and optimize current content, especially around new terminology (e.g., non-human identity security)](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Support for Aembit's planned "maturity quiz" campaign and microsite development](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Potential to repurpose Aembit's NHICon virtual conference content](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

### Technical Content Expertise

  - [GrowthX has experience with technical clients (e.g., Abnormal Security, GitPod)](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Can produce in-depth technical content leveraging AI assistance and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Ability to create both short-form and long-form content as the engagement progresses](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)

### Collaboration and Workflow

  - [GrowthX aims to be self-sufficient after initial calibration period](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Regular check-ins and performance reporting (e.g., via Slack, dashboards)](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust focus based on Aembit's priorities (e.g., product launches, campaigns)](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aembit to review and sign PandaDoc agreement if ready to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Tentative start after RSA conference (likely May)](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [Dan to share NHICon conference content with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Potential introduction to Vappy AI for voice agent integration with maturity quiz](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare for leveraging RSA conference insights in initial content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Rz5jd2ZLqNNRNhGZ5jHMu-x3xJJzBr8_?tab=summary&timestamp=2117.0)
